query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS global_bracket_defaults (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id INT NOT NULL,
  profit_target_pct INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 50,
  stop_loss_pct INT DEFAULT NULL,
  dte_floor INT DEFAULT NULL,
  updated_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  UNIQUE KEY uq_gbd_user (user_id),
  CONSTRAINT fk_gbd_user FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
);
